news.t: Quantum Computing Investing Gets an Important Refresh
Washington's $2 Billion Quantum Bet Can Prop Up These ETFs

holdings.infoBox: WQTM is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are D-Wave Quantum stock at 5.68%, Rigetti Computing at 5.66%, IonQ, Inc. at 5.15%, Quantinuum at 5.00%, and International Business Machines at 3.52%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Quantum Computing Fund (WQTM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is a passively managed fund that invests globally in companies engaged in quantum computing activities. The index is weighted based on relevancy and purity scores WQTM was launched on Oct 9, 2025 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: WisdomTree Classiq Quantum Computing UCITS Index

data.title: Quantum Computing Investing Gets an Important Refresh
data.text: There was a time when the quantum computing investment thesis was more hype than anything. That was enough to tempt some retail investors for a while.

data.title: Washington's $2 Billion Quantum Bet Can Prop Up These ETFs
data.text: Artificial intelligence (AI) might be the talk of the town these days, but quantum computing is the quiet thunder rumbling in the background. It just got much louder with the U.S. White House commitin...
